page_title: The 10 Best Happy Hours in Austin Right Now

restaurants.name: Hillside Farmacy
restaurants.cuisine: American, Brunch, Coffee Shop, Cafe, Breakfast, Wine Bar, Bar, Seafood, Restaurant
restaurants.image_alt: Pappardelle pasta with meat sauce, grated cheese, and green herbs.
restaurants.blurb: Half-price oysters, half-price draft beer, and half-price wine bottles three days a week. Then Wednesday night turns into a $20 Wagyu burger that comes with a free Old Fashioned, and the deal-per-square-inch math gets ridiculous.

items: Half-price specials extended late on Thursday
$20 Wagyu (or veggie) burger + fries with a free Old Fashioned

restaurants.name: Sour Duck Market
restaurants.address: 1814 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd
restaurants.image_alt: Golden pastries topped with cream, roasted peaches, and green herb sprigs.
restaurants.blurb: All-day $3 Lone Star and a 3-6pm window of $6 palomas, $4 lager pints, $6 single burgers, and $3 soft-serve sundaes. A sun-drenched patio that's been packed since 2017. The platonic ideal of an Austin afternoon.

items: $1 off wine, draft beer, and cider

restaurants.name: Péché
restaurants.image_alt: Hand turning absinthe fountain tap, water dripping onto sugar cube.
restaurants.deal_headline: Half-Off Food & $6 Cocktails, Mon-Fri (Mondays run till 10:30pm)
restaurants.blurb: Half off select food and $6 cocktails at a real-deal French absinthe bar, and Mondays run until 10:30pm, which is unhinged generosity for a place this nice. Order the steak frites and a Sazerac and pretend it's 1920.

items: Same happy hour menu runs all night
Same happy hour menu runs all night

restaurants.name: Eberly
restaurants.image_alt: Frozen green drink with chili-spiced rim and lime.
restaurants.deal_headline: $7 Martinis, $5 Snacks & $10 Burgers at the Cedar Tavern, Daily
restaurants.blurb: The Cedar Tavern bar tucked inside Eberly runs $7 martinis, $5 snacks, and $10 burgers nightly during early-evening happy hour, plus $10 featured wines and cocktails. A genuine New York-energy bar in the middle of South Lamar.

items: Same Cedar Tavern happy hour menu, earlier start on weekends

restaurants.name: Lazarus Brewing Co. East 6th
restaurants.image_alt: Fish tacos with rice, beans, and sauce on a blue plate.
restaurants.blurb: The 3-6-9 model does exactly what it says: $3 house lagers and bean-and-cheese tostadas, $6 cocktails and queso, $9 anything bigger. Mon-Thu 4-6pm at the most consistently good brewery on the east side.

items: $3 Time Machine pints and bean-and-cheese tostadas
$6 chips with salsa, queso, or guac
$9 cocktail upgrades and larger shareable plates

restaurants.name: The Austin Beer Garden Brewing Co.
restaurants.cuisine: Pizza, Brewery, Pub, Event Venue, Bar, Restaurant
restaurants.image_alt: Burger with glazed meat, colorful coleslaw, and pickles on a bun.
restaurants.deal_headline: $10 Hoppy Hour Combos & $1 Off Pints, Tue-Sun
restaurants.blurb: Award-winning Austin brewery slinging $10 hoppy-hour combos (wings and beer, brat and beer, sliders) Tue-Sun, with $1 off pints, $2 off pitchers, or $9 slice-and-pint depending on which day you show up. The patio's worth the wait.

items: $10 Hoppy Hour combos: wings and beer, brat and beer, sliders and beer, pretzel and beer, karaage nuggets

restaurants.name: Whisler’s
restaurants.image_alt: Dimly lit cocktail bar interior with antique fixtures.
restaurants.blurb: Austin's reigning cocktail temple runs five high-caliber drinks at $8 to $10 every weekday 4-7pm. The Whisler's Old Fashioned is the city's gold standard, and at $10 it's still cheaper than most downtown speakeasies' off-menu pours.

restaurants.name: Anthem
restaurants.image_alt: Seared fish on noodles, topped with pickled onions and sesame seeds.
restaurants.deal_headline: $8 Cocktails & $5 to $10 Shareable Plates, Every Day 3-6:30pm
restaurants.blurb: All-day happy hour on Rainey Street is rare, and Anthem runs $6 to $8 cocktails, $5 wines, and a serious shareable-plates menu ($5 Thai curry fries, $7 crab rangoon, $8 hatch queso) from 3-6:30pm every single day.

items: $6 Modelo and Kirin draft  ·  $5 Michelob Ultra
$5 Thai curry fries and charred edamame
$10 yummy fries, mac poppers, popcorn chicken
Same happy hour menu runs as a late-night encore

restaurants.name: Café No Sé
restaurants.image_alt: Two iced drinks, menu, and sunglasses on a wooden table.
restaurants.deal_headline: Rosé & Fries Happy Hour: Half-Off Bottles + $8 Bottomless Fries
restaurants.blurb: Rosé & Fries Happy Hour: half-off bottles of rosé, bottomless $8 fries, $5 off cocktails. Sun through Thursday until 8pm, weekends till 9pm. Inside the South Congress Hotel, on a patio that's catnip for golden-hour photos.

restaurants.name: The Tavern
restaurants.image_alt: Pulled pork sandwich, coleslaw, and baked beans on a bar.
restaurants.deal_headline: $2 Off Wells, $5 Margs & 30% Off Starters, Mon-Fri 3-6pm
restaurants.blurb: The 1916 dive at 12th and Lamar runs a rotating daily-themed food deal (20% off Tavern burger Mondays, Tex-Mex Tuesdays, wings Wednesdays) plus $2 off wells, $5 margs, and 30% off starters during the 3-6pm window. Pretty much the only Austin bar that's been a happy hour since Prohibition ended.

items: $4 pints (Dos XX, Altstadt, Celis rotating tap)
Themed 20% food deal: Tavern burger Mon, Tex-Mex Tue, wings Wed, buffalo wrap Thu, chicken-fried chicken Fri
Same happy hour drink deals extended till 11pm
